# AI Local Business

> AI Local Business is a digital marketing agency in Bergen County, New Jersey, specializing in local SEO and AI search optimization (AEO) for service-area businesses. We help local trades and small businesses get found on Google, Google Maps, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and other AI search platforms. Founded by Spencer Scott.

AI Local Business works with HVAC contractors, plumbers, landscapers, bakeries, and other local service businesses in Northern New Jersey — primarily Bergen County towns like Glen Rock, Ridgewood, Wyckoff, Paramus, Hackensack, Teaneck, and Fair Lawn.

Our core services include Google Business Profile setup and optimization, fast Hugo-based website builds, local SEO strategy, and AI search optimization (AEO) — helping businesses become the answer when customers ask AI tools for local recommendations.

Contact: spencerscottdigital@gmail.com | Phone: (561) 212-8244 | Website: https://ailocalbusiness.biz

## Core Pages

- [Services](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/services/): Full list of local SEO, website, and AI search optimization services offered
- [About](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/about/): Background on Spencer Scott and the agency's approach
- [Free AI Search Audit](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/audit/): Free audit offering for local businesses to see how they appear in AI search results

## Blog Posts

- [Why Word-of-Mouth in Bergen County Isn't Enough Anymore](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/blog/word-of-mouth-bergen-county-not-enough/): How local service businesses in Northern NJ can get found on Google Maps and AI search
- [How to Get Your Business on ChatGPT](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/blog/how-to-get-your-business-on-chatgpt/): Guide for local businesses on appearing in AI-generated answers
- [What Is AI Search Optimization?](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/blog/what-is-ai-search-optimization/): Explainer on AEO and why it matters for local businesses
- [Local SEO Basics for Bergen County](https://ailocalbusiness.biz/blog/local-seo-basics-bergen-county/): Foundation guide for Bergen County businesses getting started with local SEO
